architecture_summary.stack: Python 3.12 FastAPI service packaged with uv
trust_boundaries: FastAPI server to isolated Codex SDK process
local .env and OS environment into server settings
invariants: /v1/* access control is enforced when CODEX_OAUTH_API_KEY or CODEX_OAUTH_API_ALLOWED_IPS is configured
forwarded client IP headers are not trusted
Codex SDK calls run with isolated CODEX_HOME, HOME, and USERPROFILE

infrastructure.secret_management: OS environment variables plus ignored local .env; project-local Codex OAuth state

commands: custom high-confidence secret scan over current tracked files and git history
rg high-risk OWASP and LLM patterns
results: No tracked real .env file; only .env.example is tracked
No high-confidence secret patterns found in current tracked files or git history
No tracked CI, container, IaC, webhook, upload, or WebSocket surfaces found
32 tests passed with one existing TestClient deprecation warning

external_sources.name: pip-audit PyPI project
external_sources.purpose: Dependency vulnerability scanner behavior and data source context
